C: Adherence | D: 1) Depending on how many times a target was called when compared to planned PDE, adherence is decided
2) If a target is called 80-120% of the planned PDE, it is optimally called. Above it is over called and below it is under called
3) If the total no. of PDE is less than 10, there are seperate product specific rules | E: Geography, product, Segment, Specialty | F: QTD | G: x=Sum of PDE to targets/Planned PDE
x>=0.8 or x<=1.2 => Optimally Called
x<0.8 => Under Called
x>1.2 => Over Called
